name: Heavy Duty Warehouse Framework
description: Engineered and fabricated structural steel frameworks for a 50,000 sq.ft industrial logistics warehouse. Incorporates heavy-duty portal frames and high-tensile column brackets to support overhead crane loads.

name: Cement Plant Pressure Piping
description: High-pressure, chemical-resistant carbon steel pipeline fabrication for a major cement kiln line expansion. Fully MIG welded, X-ray tested, and custom coated for extreme operational environments.

name: Commercial Atrium Steel Truss
description: Architecturally exposed structural steel trusses and modern aesthetic supporting brackets for a high-end corporate headquarters atrium. Features seamless visual welds and high durability satin finish.

name: Custom Laser Cut Machinery Enclosures
description: High-precision sheet metal fabrication and fiber laser cutting for dust-tight, soundproof industrial generator enclosures. Complete with powder coating and integrated exhaust ventilation baffles.

name: Industrial Walkways & Platform Structure
description: Safety-first heavy steel access platforms, stairs, and handrail systems for a mineral processing plant. Engineered to international safety standards, hot-dip galvanized for corrosion protection.

name: Architectural Decorative Steel Pillars
description: Crafted ornamental structural column covers and cladding for an institutional building lobby. Engineered in Brushed Stainless Steel with hidden fasteners and seamless alignment panels.
